CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-12-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. ERRONEOUS SETTING. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REPLY MEMO OF P & A IN SUPPORT OF MTN TO DISMISS/ALT TO STRIKE NTC OF APPEAL FILED BY RESPONDENT YARON, GEORGE AN INDIVIDUAL DBA YARON & ASSOCIATES

LAW AND MOTION, 302, THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER ARGUEMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. RESPONDENT GEORGE YARON'S MOTION TO DISMISS, OR ALTERNATIVELY, TO STRIKE NOTICE OF APPEAL IS DENIED. THE COURT DEEMS THAT THE NOTICE OF APPEAL WAS FILED ON SEPTEMBER 4, 2012, NUNC PRO TUNC. THE CLERK DID NOT HAVE A PROPER BASIS TO REJECT THE NOTICES OF APPEAL FILED ON SEPTEMBER 4, 2012. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077
REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR DEC-10-2012. MATTER SETTLED WITH THE JUDGE PRO TEM. CASE IS ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 610 ON MAR-12-2013 AT 10:30 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385. (206)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2013 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-10-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-12-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Dismiss/Alt Strike Ntc Of Appeal And Req. For Judicial Ntc
Off Calendar Oct-24-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Bentley P. Yim, Esq. of Yaron & Associates, Tel. 415.658.2929, for respondent and moving party;
Mark C. Thomas, Esq. of Brownstein Thomas LLP, Tel. 415.986.1338 x140, for appellant and opposing party.

The matter was argued. After arguement, the court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT GEORGE YARON'S Motion To Dismiss, or alternatively, to Strike Notice Of Appeal is denied. The Court deems that the notice of appeal was filed on September 4, 2012, nunc pro tunc. The clerk did not have a proper basis to reject the notices of appeal filed on September 4, 2012. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077
